content.en:
When Ye Tian came here, there happened to be a highness who was also here, and he also came.

For the first time, Ye Tian's copying talent shrouded the other party and checked the other party's talent.

Triangular: Golden River

Cultivation talent: Hong level

Strength Talent: God

Speed Talent: God-level

Defense Talent: God-level

Boxing talent: No superior

Golden Armor Talent: God-level

Thunder talent: God-level

......

"Triangle Clan!"

Ye Tian had no impression of this race, it should not be one of the great races in the universe, but it definitely belonged to one of the higher races.

Because only the higher races have a chance to enter the ruin world, and those weak races have no chance.

The evaluation criterion of the higher race is whether there is a supreme level existence in the race, if there is a supreme level, plus some masters can be evaluated as a high race, otherwise no matter how many dominant-level powerhouses can not become a high race.

For example, the Crystal Spirit Race, one of the vassal races of the human race, cannot be ranked as a high-level race because it does not exist at the supreme level, and can only be regarded as a small race.

"Terran!"

Jin He of the Triangle Clan saw Ye Tian's expression, and his expression changed slightly.

The human race is the highness of the universe race, and as one of the higher races, his highness is most afraid of meeting the highness of the universe race.

"I hope it's just an ordinary-level highness!"

Jin Ha expects in his heart.

He really didn't want to give up the Chaos Treasure not far away, although he was not cultivating the Chaos Dao, but a treasure like Chaos was useful to all cultivators, but it was more useful to the Chaos Dao cultivators.

Swish!

Jin He flew quickly, hoping to be the first to snatch the Chaos Treasure.

"It's coming!

The treasure was already in sight, a grass growing on a cliff face that had cracked in the earth.

This grass was about a person's height, and it was filled with a strong aura of the law of chaos and a faint origin of chaos.

Obviously, this grass is a relatively high-level Chaos Treasure.

Jin He saw it, and Ye Tian also saw it!

However, the Golden River is closer to this grass.

"Ten Thousand Realms!"

Ye Tian instantly unleashed this spatial divine power, trapping Jin He in the Ten Thousand Realms at once.

He didn't know what Jin He's strength was, but even if he was a first-grade Eternal Ancient Highness, he couldn't break the Ten Thousand Realms in an instant.

After trapping Jin He, Ye Tian urged Black Feather.

Wow!

A pair of black wings appeared behind Ye Tian, and with a slight shock, Ye Tian flew over at a speed beyond teleportation, and came to the cliff in an instant.

Immediately.

He carefully took the Chaos Grass, but the Golden River of the Triangle Clan took out a small golden arrow, urging the golden arrow to burst out with a golden light.

Rumble!!!!

The golden light penetrated through Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Realms Barrier with incredible speed and strength.

"Put down that little grass!"

Jin He roared.

The level of that little grass was so high, if he absorbed and refined, he was even expected to advance the divine code to the consummation realm, so he naturally didn't want Ye Tian to take it.

To this end, he even used a secret treasure given to him by the middle and high levels of the clan, which was specifically aimed at formations and enchantments, and was extremely destructive.

"A good secret treasure, it actually broke my Ten Thousand Realms!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

I saw that the golden light turned back into Jin He's hand and turned into a golden arrow.

"I got this little grass, it should belong to me, you want to snatch it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"That's right!" Jin He threatened, "I saw it first, if you hadn't trapped me with your spatial supernatural power just now, otherwise this chaos grass would have belonged to me." If you hand over this little grass, I only need half of it, and if you don't want to, then don't blame me for killing you!"

"Just because you want to kill me?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Hearing Ye Tian's ridicule and disdain, Jin He made a move.

He punched out, as if he had hit a big day.

This is a high-level unsurpassed boxing technique with a perfect level!

"You don't have superior boxing skills, you can't even learn boxing, you're too weak!"

Ye Tian slashed it away with a knife.

The Heavenly Moon Sword Peerless Technique instantly broke through Jin He's supreme fist technique, and then penetrated through his physical body.

Suddenly.

Jin He stood in mid-air, his body frozen, and the aura in his eyes gradually dimmed.

Then, the golden river fell from mid-air, and the body continued to disintegrate, and when it fell to the earth, only some fragments of the body remained!

"The second grade of the pinnacle-level Son of the Universe is considered a good strength, and it should be one of the leaders of the Triangle Clan, but it's a pity that it's still too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Jin He died, Ye Tian stepped forward to take off the other party's portable void ring, and after taking a look, there were really a lot of good things.

After all, the Triangle Clan is also one of the higher races, and it also wants to impact the ranks of the great races of the universe, so it has invested a lot in the cultivation of His Highnesses under his command, and even gave many treasures, just hoping that one of His Highnesses can bring back inheritance or amazing treasures.

Therefore, even if he is only a second-grade pinnacle-level son of the universe, his treatment is even comparable to Ye Tian's treatment.

In addition to the Sharp Arrow Secret Treasure, there was also a bead that contained the terrifying power of the Thunder Origin, which made Ye Tiandu feel frightened, and it should also be a one-time weapon that could burst out with a terrifying attack.

In addition, there is also a drop of billions of stone emulsions that can restore the body, and once absorbed, it can instantly save a highness from a seriously injured and dying state and restore peak combat power.

Such treasures are very rare, and Ye Tian does not have them.

In addition to these treasures, Jinhe also has a lot of divine crystals and countless other treasures, and the total value is also very high.

After killing a highness, Ye Tian's net worth has increased a lot.

However, the ordinary treasures were of little use to Ye Tian now, and there was not much excitement.

What really made Ye Tian's heart flutter was the chaos grass, its value was immeasurable, and it helped Ye Tian a lot.

Ye Tian had never seen such a high-level Chaos Treasure, and he might be able to advance his Chaos Refining Technique to the Fifth Layer Perfection Realm.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian left quickly and continued to look for opportunities.

In this relic world, Chaos Grass is not a real big chance, and a real big chance can even be of great help to a race, and can even make a race rise.

And a Chaos Treasure Grass is nothing at all, it's just that Ye Tian and that Jin He have just come in, so they will feel very precious, and when they see a lot of treasures like Chaos Grass, they will feel average.

It didn't take long.

Thundered!!!!

There was a sound of battle in front of him, Ye Tian stealthily approached and took a look, and found that it was two aliens fighting, so he did not participate, but chose to leave.

In the following day, Ye Tian encountered a lot of good things, took them one by one, and gained a lot, during which he also fought with several foreign highnesses and easily killed them.

this day.

Ye Tian walked a mountain range, and saw a majestic figure emerge in front of him, and a terrifying aura instantly enveloped the four directions.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian's heart moved.

"Someone must have touched the ruins!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Ruins are undoubtedly the most precious places in the world of ruins, but there are not many ruins that can survive the great destruction of the universe and have not been swept away by their predecessors.

In the last cosmic era, many forces kept some inheritance and precious things in this relic world, so there were ruins in this relic world.

But the world of ruins has been opened many times, and many ruins have been discovered, only a small number of ruins have been patronized, but there are still treasures and inheritances that have not been taken away, it is too difficult, and the emperor-level highnesses can hardly be taken away, and they are not even allowed to be taken away.

The Terrans also knew the location of some ruins, but they couldn't get any benefit from going there, so they didn't give Ye Tian a map.

Only some ruins that have not been found will make it possible to get good things.

Swish!

Ye Tian urged the black feather and flew over quickly.

Soon, Ye Tian arrived at his destination.

Really.

There is indeed a ruin in the depths of this mountain range, an ancient temple.

The ancient temple has gone through the traces of time and the shock of the great collapse of the universe, and now it is very dilapidated, but the traces of the past can still be seen from this huge scale.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian also saw several highnesses, two of them of the God Clan, two of the Demon Clan, as well as the Golden Clan, and the Angel Clan.

Coupled with Ye Tian, who had just arrived, there were already seven highnesses gathered here.

"Terran!"

When the highnesses of the Protoss and the Demon Clan saw Ye Tian, they smiled contemptuously and ignored it, obviously thinking that Ye Tian was no threat.

And His Royal Highness of the Golden Clan came over and said to Ye Tian: "Friend of the Human Race, how about our alliance, this ruin has just appeared, I don't know what the situation is inside, the two of us have formed an alliance, it is safer!"

"Not interested!"

Ye Tian refused.

"You ......"

His Royal Highness the Golden Clan was a little annoyed, but he still didn't say anything, and turned around and retreated far away.

The reason why these highnesses did not immediately enter this ancient temple was because they did not know the situation, and the Xuanyuan Lord had also reminded Ye Tian that even if he saw a ruin, he could not enter casually if he was not clear, otherwise once he encountered the killing array, he would definitely die!

At this time.

The highnesses of the Protoss and the Demon Race took out the puppets one after another, allowing the puppets to enter the ruins first.

And Ye Tian also took out a puppet, which he exchanged from the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, after all, if you want to come to the universe ruin world, you naturally have to prepare something, otherwise it is easy to suffer.

Boom Boom Boom !!

A puppet entered the ancient temple and soon returned.

No danger!

Whew!!

His Royal Highness rushed into the ancient temple one by one, for fear that the benefits would be taken away by others.

Ye Tian also rushed in at the first time, and as soon as he entered the ancient temple, he saw a large number of corpses.

These bones are basically sitting cross-legged, and there is no flesh and skin in sight, only a white skeleton, which is full of traces of time and ancient atmosphere.

His Highness of the Golden Clan touched a white bone, and the white bone instantly turned into powder.

"It should be a character from the previous universe, the corpse has existed for too long, and it can't be preserved at all!" Ye Tian sighed.

So many people died all at once, and from the sitting position, it didn't seem to have been killed by someone, but it didn't look like they were killed by the shockwave of the Great Destruction of the Universe.

In fact, Ye Tian has always had a puzzle, since this relic world has survived the Great Destruction of the Universe, why didn't any of the creatures in the last universe epoch survive to this cosmic era?

Xuanyuan dominates them, they may or may not know, and Ye Tian didn't ask.

Enter the Buddhist hall of the ancient temple.

Ye Tian saw a huge Buddha statue, and in the last cosmic era, there were also forces like Buddha.

And under the statue of the Buddha, there is a sitting person, wearing a robe, like a living person.

But Ye Tian was sure that the other party was dead, and there was no life on his body.

One of the highnesses of the demon clan touched the other party, thinking that this person would turn into ashes.

But suddenly, a wave of volatility dispersed.

"Not good!"

The faces of the seven highnesses all changed drastically.

Bang!!!!!!

A picture instantly filled their sea of consciousness.
